message:
✨ iMessage-style input bar, active status, rename fix (#2)

* 🐛 Fix input bar visibility and active session status

- Handle 'active' status in ChatView header (green 'active' label)
- Make input bar more visible with subtle background
- Show custom session name in header if set
- Differentiate placeholder text for running/active/ended sessions

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ iMessage-style input bar with bottom padding

- Rounded pill input with native styling (like iMessage)
- Circular send button
- Bottom padding so input doesn't touch screen edge
- Subtle background on input area
- Pause session list polling while editing names/tags
- Handle 'active' status in ChatView header
- Show custom session name in header

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
